prompt: A cinematic mirror selfie inside a dark metallic elevator an {argument name="subject" default="American white young man"} with sharp jawline and facial features clean shaved and {argument name="outfit" default="leather jacket"} holds a spinning {argument name="energy color" default="blue"} energy spiral in his left palm while capturing himself on phone. His anime counterpart stands directly behind him: white spiky hair, black mask, purple jacket, radiating matching blue cursed energy. The reflection in the steel doors shows both worlds merging. Vertical 9:13 format. Ultra photorealistic, 8K, no text overlays, cinematic color grading.
